About NextCap

A local contractor focused on durable work and strong client relationships.

NextCap LLC brings together roofing expertise, painting craftsmanship, and dependable exterior work for homeowners and businesses across West Virginia.

100%Commitment to quality

Why choose NextCap

  • Clear communication from estimate to completion
  • High standards for preparation, cleanup, and final details
  • Flexible services for homes, additions, and commercial projects
  • Built around long-lasting performance instead of quick fixes

Serving Hurricane and the wider West Virginia region.

We work with property owners who want a contractor that cares about craftsmanship, timelines, and respectful service.
